entities.name: ECMA262
entities.context: A standard specification for scripting languages, specifically JavaScript.

entities.name: Reserved Word
entities.context: Keywords in JavaScript that cannot be used as identifiers.

entities.name: strict mode
entities.context: A strict variant of JavaScript that enforces stricter parsing and error handling on your JavaScript code.

relationships.context: Reserved Words are defined within the ECMA262 standard.
Strict mode impacts the usage of Reserved Words in JavaScript.
